query: SELECT id, messageType, LEFT(mediaUrl, 150) as url_preview, media_mime_type, media_file_name FROM messages WHERE messageType IN ('imageMessage', 'image') AND mediaUrl IS NOT NULL AND mediaUrl != '' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10
